iteration_1.notes: Rewrote skill from 434-line verbose original to concise 73-line version with explicit category mappings and working md5sum commands. Dedup still scored 0 because model used 'message' tool instead of text response.

iteration_2.notes: Added instruction to output results as plain text response, not via messaging tools. Both tasks now pass.

changes_made: Replaced 434-line verbose skill with concise 75-line version optimized for small models
Added explicit file extension to category mappings (documents, images, code, media, archives, other)
Provided working bash commands for file organization using for loops
Fixed duplicate detection: replaced broken 'md5 | sort | uniq -d' with 'md5sum' and 'md5 -r' fallback
Added clear output format template for duplicate reports
Added instruction to output results as plain text, not via messaging tools
Added 'execute immediately, never ask for confirmation' directive
